candidate_definitions.text: [NeurIPS'23 Oral] Visual Instruction Tuning (LLaVA) built towards GPT-4V level capabilities and beyond.
*Visual instruction tuning towards large language and vision models with GPT-4 level capabilities.*
One-for-All Multimodal Evaluation Toolkit Across Text, Image, Video, and Audio Tasks
The code used to train and run inference with the ColVision models, e.g. ColPali, ColQwen2, and ColSmol.
[![arXiv](https://img.shields.io/badge/arXiv-2407.01449-b31b1b.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.01449)
InternLM-XComposer2.5-OmniLive: A Comprehensive Multimodal System for Long-term Streaming Video and Audio Interactions
Parsing-free RAG supported by VLMs
[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/VisRAG-000000?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=000&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/OpenBMB/VisRAG)
A novel Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) architecture, designed to structurally align visual and textual embeddings.
<div align="center">
🎉 The code repository for "Parrot: Multilingual Visual Instruction Tuning" in PyTorch.
This repository contains the code and data for the paper "VisOnlyQA: Large Vision Language Models Still Struggle with Visual Perception of Geometric Information" (COLM 2025)
[CVPR 2024 Highlight🔥] Chat-UniVi: Unified Visual Representation Empowers Large Language Models with Image and Video Understanding
<div align=center>
The official repo of Qwen-VL (通义千问-VL) chat & pretrained large vision language model proposed by Alibaba Cloud.
[CVPR 2024 Highlight] OPERA: Alleviating Hallucination in Multi-Modal Large Language Models via Over-Trust Penalty and Retrospection-Allocation
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-g.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning Qwen-VL series by Alibaba Cloud.
This repository contains a script for training [Qwen2-VL](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2-VL-7B-Instruct), [Qwen2.5-VL](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct)

The Cradle framework is a first attempt at General Computer Control (GCC). Cradle supports agents to ace any computer task by enabling strong reasoning abilities, self-improvment, and skill curation, in a standardized general environment with minimal requirements.
<div align="center">
OmniVinci is an omni-modal LLM for joint understanding of vision, audio, and language.

Chatbot Arena meets multi-modality! Multi-Modality Arena allows you to benchmark vision-language models side-by-side while providing images as inputs. Supports MiniGPT-4, LLaMA-Adapter V2, LLaVA, BLIP-2, and many more!
An open-source implementaion for Gemma3 series by Google.
This repository contains a script for training [Gemma3](https://huggingface.co/google/gemma-3-4b-it) with only using HuggingFace.
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning Llama3.2-Vision series by Meta.

This repository contains a script for training [Llama3.2-Vision](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct) with only using HuggingFace and [Liger-Kernel](https://github.com/linkedin/Liger-Kernel).
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning Phi3-Vision and Phi3.5-Vision by Microsoft.

This repository contains a script for training the [Phi3-Vision model](https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3-vision-128k-instruct) and [Phi3.5-Vision model](https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3.5-vision-instruct)

[ICML'25] Official implementation of paper "SparseVLM: Visual Token Sparsification for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference" and "SparseVLM+: Visual Token Sparsification with Improved Text-Visual Attention Pattern"
Effortless data labeling with AI support from Segment Anything and other awesome models.
<div align="center">
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning Pixtral by MistralAI.
This repository contains a script for training Trnasformers compatible [Pixtral-12b](https://huggingface.co/mistral-community/pixtral-12b).
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning SmolVLM.
This repository contains a script for training [SmolVLM](https://huggingface.co/HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-Instruct) with only using HuggingFace.
Official repo for "Mini-Gemini: Mining the Potential of Multi-modality Vision Language Models"
A Simple, Lightweight, and Extensible Serving Framework for X-AnyLabeling
<div align="center">
[CVPR 2024 Oral] InternVL Family: A Pioneering Open-Source Alternative to GPT-4o.  接近GPT-4o表现的开源多模态对话模型
<div align="center">
The official repo of MiniMax-Text-01 and MiniMax-VL-01, large-language-model & vision-language-model based on Linear Attention
<div align="center">
MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.
[![Upload Python Package](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vlm/actions/workflows/python-publish.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Blaizzy/mlx-vlm/actions/workflows/python-publish.yml)
Scaling Vision Pre-Training to 4K Resolution
<div align="center">
A collection of original, innovative ideas and algorithms towards Advanced Literate Machinery. This project is maintained by the OCR Team in the Language Technology Lab, Tongyi Lab, Alibaba Group.

The ultimate goal of our research is to build a system that has high-level intelligence, i.e., possessing the abilities to ***read, think and create***, so advanced that it could even surpass human intelligence one day in the future. We name this kind of systems **Advanced Liter…
Bridging Large Vision-Language Models and End-to-End Autonomous Driving
<div align ="center">
Florence-2 is a novel vision foundation model with a unified, prompt-based representation for a variety of computer vision and vision-language tasks.
<div align="center">
This repository contains the implementation for the paper "Revisiting Few Shot Object Detection with Vision-Language Models"
[![arXiv](https://img.shields.io/badge/arXiv-2312.14494-b31b1b.svg)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.14494)
